sections.heading: Talk with Our Production Team
sections.text: close Talk with Our Production Team Hello! We just need a few bits of information, and then a manufacturing expert will reach out to you directly to see how we can partner on a future production project. Thank you! We've received your request and a member of our team will reach out shortly. First Name Last Name Company Email Phone Number (optional) Project Description Which manufacturing service(s) are you interested in? Injection Molding CNC Machining 3D Printing Sheet Metal Fabrication Decide Later Are these parts subject to ITAR or other export restrictions? Yes No Send To Our Team

sections.heading: Production Manufacturing
sections.text: Production Manufacturing With customizable manufacturing programs supported by advanced technology and human expertise, there’s a smarter way to do production Start Production Quote Get Instant Quote

sections.heading: Your Global Production Supplier with Domestic Supply Chain Management in the United States and Europe
sections.text: Your Global Production Supplier with Domestic Supply Chain Management in the United States and Europe

sections.heading: Intuitive Quoting & Ordering Experience
sections.text: Intuitive Quoting & Ordering Experience We understand that scaling to production volumes of end-use parts can be as complex as the design that came before it. Intuitive, purpose-built technology helps to lighten the load. You need a responsive interface that quotes detailed BOMs fast, a system that simplifies collaboration between your engineering and procurement teams, and an easy way to make those inevitable changes to your order.

sections.heading: A Team of Manufacturing Expert s to Guide You
sections.text: A Team of Manufacturing Expert s to Guide You When you're ordering at this scale, there are times when you just want to speak with real people—a team who's on your side and has done this before; people who know the difference a thousandth of an inch in tolerance makes, or what you’re up against when you’re complying with medical device regulations. Those kinds of people. When you manufacture with Protolabs, you’re backed by an entire team of production experts, humans who can help you manufacture like a pro.

sections.heading: Every Production Project Supported from Start to Finish
sections.text: Every Production Project Supported from Start to Finish

sections.heading: The Manufacturing Journey of Production Parts
sections.text: The Manufacturing Journey of Production Parts Using digital automation, and extensive production expertise, we have optimized the process of manufacturing parts for end-use, so you can get quality, production-grade parts faster than ever. Watch the video to see how we take your product from concept to completion.

sections.heading: Quality Control & Certification for Production
sections.text: Quality Control & Certification for Production Our industry-standard procedures and certifications guarantee quality and regulatory compliance. CMM inspection report First Article Inspection (FAI) Dimensional Inspection Report (DIR) PPAP Material Certificates + Certificate of Analysis Conflict Minerals Reporting REACH + RoHS Certificates Prop65 Industry Certifications: ISO 9001 and AS 9100 Certificate of Conformance (CoC) Industry Certifications (Protolabs Network): ISO 13485, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, and ISO TS16949 Download our quality and compliance guide

sections.heading: Injection Molding
sections.text: Injection Molding Get affordable, high-quality molded parts and bridge tooling within days. With our free moldability consultation, the design and molding process is rapidly accelerated to save you time and money. Learn More

sections.heading: CNC Machining
sections.text: CNC Machining Leverage the same speed, precision, and reliability in machining that you’re accustomed to at Protolabs but unlock advanced machining capabilities like tighter tolerances and volume pricing through our manufacturing network. Learn More

sections.heading: 3D Printing
sections.text: 3D Printing Want quality parts and additive expertise at a single 3D printing source? Choose from seven different additive manufacturing technologies for cost-effective prototyping and highly precise, repeatable production parts. Learn More

sections.heading: Sheet Metal Fabrication
sections.text: Sheet Metal Fabrication From easy quoting to quick-turn production and finishing options, get up to 500 quality sheet metal parts in your hands in days from a single supplier. Learn More

sections.heading: How the Production Process Works
sections.text: How the Production Process Works We want to make partnering with us on a production project as smooth and streamlined as possible.

sections.heading: Pro Tips
sections.text: Pro Tips

sections.heading: Tip #1
sections.text: Tip #1 Optimize runner and gate configurations within your DFM analysis to reduce cycle times

sections.heading: Tip #2
sections.text: Tip #2 Design for assembly upfront for an easier build later on in the manufacturing process

sections.heading: Tip #3
sections.text: Tip #3 Find a supplier who can support your team through the entire product life cycle

sections.heading: Tip #4
sections.text: Tip #4 Prioritize suppliers with multi-process manufacturing capabilities–juggling vendors can be costly and time-consuming
